positive: Kawaii-style character illustration of a sleepy otter wearing a tiny beret, surrounded by floating bubbles and stars. Cute, adorable, Japanese kawaii art style, soft vector illustration, flat colors, clean lines, perfect for stickers, --ar 1:1
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, gritty, complex shading
